methods.BigInteger binomial(int n, int k): Returns n choose k, also known as the binomial coefficient of n and k, that is, n! / (k! (n - k)!).
methods.BigInteger divide(BigInteger p, BigInteg: Returns the result of dividing p by q, rounding using the specified RoundingMode.
methods.BigInteger factorial(int n): Returns n!, that is, the product of the first n positive integers, or 1 if n == 0.
methods.boolean isPowerOfTwo(BigInteger x): Returns true if x represents a power of two.
methods.int log10(BigInteger x, RoundingMode mod: Returns the base-10 logarithm of x, rounded according to the specified rounding mode.
methods.int log2(BigInteger x, RoundingMode mode: Returns the base-2 logarithm of x, rounded according to the specified rounding mode.
methods.BigInteger sqrt(BigInteger x, RoundingMo: Returns the square root of x, rounded with the specified rounding mode.
